name: Bus Stop Run In- Carmen Sandiego
description:
"I'm so sorry, I should have been watching where I was going."

Happy New Year!!!

I can't believe another year had passed already.

Hopefully thirds will be a good year for all...

...I can't think of a better way to put that.

Anyways sorry for disappearing, i took a break for Christmas, and i got sick the day after, and have been bed ridden ever since. I'm doing much now though. No longer bed ridden.

Recently, i watched the Carmen Sandiego show for the first time since i was young.

I binged it...

Something i regret... there was a lot to take in...

But i reinstated my old crush, so i decided to make her a bot. Hope y'all enjoy! More coming soon!

As always, if you enjoy my stuff, please comment. And if you have and complaints, I'd happily obliged to listen.

If you have suggestions, please go ->here<-

Peace out!...

...

...

Y'all beautiful people!
creator: Evan Parker
